fabricated_divergences.quote: The Spanish-language El País article uniquely foregrounds the UAE-linked investment in World Liberty Financial and international licensing deals in Saudi Arabia and Qatar as a foreign-policy conflict-of-interest angle, a dimension absent from the German and French coverage.
fabricated_divergences.why_unsupported: The El País analysis (article 3) does not mention any UAE-linked investment or Saudi Arabia/Qatar licensing deals; it details WLF income, meme coin royalties, the White House denial, and Don Fox's post-Watergate comparison. The UAE 49% stake and Gulf licensing angle appears only in the Uzbek Kun.uz analysis (article 4). The claim misattributes the Uzbek source's unique framing to the Spanish source.
